title: After spent 30+ hrs building loops...
summary: AI Jason released a loop engineer template and knowledge base on GitHub for building AI agent loops. The resource includes a free course, step-by-step workshop, and associated tools like Superdesign for practical implementation.
writeup: AI Jason shares a loop engineer template and knowledge base, published on GitHub, for building AI agent loops. The package bundles a free course, a step-by-step workshop, and supporting tools including Superdesign for practical implementation. The focus sits at the intersection of AI loops, AI agents, and prompt engineering, giving a structured starting point for constructing agent loops rather than assembling the pieces from scratch.
